category_sources: Official docs describe Todoman as a simple standards-based CLI todo/task manager stored in iCalendar files and syncable via CalDAV.
source_facts.description says todoman is a simple CalDAV-based todo manager.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page title is Todoman.
docs_sources: Official docs state Todoman is part of pimutils and link to its GitHub hosting.
source_facts.homepage is the official Read the Docs documentation site.
repo_sources: Official Todoman documentation says it is part of the pimutils project and hosted at GitHub.
tags_sources: Official documentation says todos are stored in iCalendar files and can sync via CalDAV.
